case_title: PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC VS. GEORGE E CRAWFORD

ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF APR-06-2021 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CRAWFORD, GEORGE E $3,027.87 PRINCIPAL, $246.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,273.87, SEE SCANNED DOC
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JAN-05-2021 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JAN-05-2021 CONTINUED TO APR-06-2021 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO ENTER DEFAULT JUDGMENT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
